name: ShellCorp
description: ShellCorp - single-brain, multi-hand AI operating system

scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck:root && npm run ui:typecheck
scripts.lint: biome lint --diagnostic-level=error --files-ignore-unknown=true --skip=style --skip=complexity --skip=a11y --skip=correctness/noUnusedImports --skip=correctness/useExhaustiveDependencies --skip=correctness/useHookAtTopLevel --skip=suspicious/noArrayIndexKey biome.json package.json cli/team-commands convex extensions/notion skills ui/src/components/hud ui/src/features/team-system ui/src/lib
scripts.lint:fix: biome lint --write --diagnostic-level=error --files-ignore-unknown=true --skip=style --skip=complexity --skip=a11y --skip=correctness/noUnusedImports --skip=correctness/useExhaustiveDependencies --skip=correctness/useHookAtTopLevel --skip=suspicious/noArrayIndexKey biome.json package.json cli/team-commands convex extensions/notion skills ui/src/components/hud ui/src/features/team-system ui/src/lib
scripts.format: biome format --write --files-ignore-unknown=true biome.json package.json cli/team-commands convex extensions/notion skills ui/src/components/hud ui/src/features/team-system ui/src/lib
scripts.format:check: biome check --files-ignore-unknown=true --linter-enabled=false --assist-enabled=false biome.json package.json cli/team-commands convex extensions/notion skills ui/src/components/hud ui/src/features/team-system ui/src/lib
